<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Project React Native onLayout/native-probe results into measurement facts.

The async probe mechanism lives outside GraphReFly; this helper only consumes the latest probe
facts as declared graph data and never pretends RN core measurement is synchronous.

## Import

```ts
import { reactNativeLayoutMeasurements } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout/react-native";
```

## Signature

```ts
function reactNativeLayoutMeasurements(opts: ReactNativeLayoutMeasurementsOptions): Node<Measurements>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `ReactNativeLayoutMeasurementsOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `Node<Measurements>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { reactNativeLayoutMeasurements } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout/react-native";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/react-native/index.ts`
